next_action: Apply one bounded repair attempt from the KrnRepairRecord, rerun the live codex exec benchmark suite explicitly, and compare the before/after delta before expanding the suite or adding dashboard/API commands.
overclaim_boundary: A proposed repair record does not prove repair quality or productivity lift. The three-task suite remains below the lift gate, so the repair attempt can only compare live delta before/after.
rationale: Goal 021 converted the no-lift benchmark evidence into a typed repair record. Goal 006 requires failures to move through repair record, smallest fix, rerun, and keep/refine/remove decision before prompt tuning, suite expansion, dashboard commands, or productivity claims.
